results.title: WTA roundup: Maria Sakkari reaches hometown final in Athens
results.description: Maria Sakkari moved within one victory of lifting a trophy in her hometown Saturday, defeating Russia's Alina Korneeva 6-1, 7-5 to reach the final of the Athens Open.

results.title: Mbappe Climbs To Top Of The Golden Boot Standings Amid France Fightback
results.description: Kylian Mbappe's second-half strike gave France hope of an unlikely comeback against England in their third-place playoff while also moving him past Lionel Messi to the top of the Golden Boot...

results.title: Roger Goodell is doing nothing to solve NFL’s see-no-evil problem — maybe it’s time to cash in
Mookie Betts thinks MLB should shorten games with 1 rule change
results.description: Mookie Betts had one suggestion for Major League Baseball to make blowouts a little less painful for all involved. In an interview with Tom Dierberger of SI, Betts suggested that games should simply end whenever a team wants to bring in a position player to pitch.

results.title: 1st ever global tournament for competitive cheerleading and dance takes place in Montreal
results.description: As Montreal marks the 50th anniversary of the 1976 Olympics – the first games on Canadian soil – another international sports event is making its debut in...

results.title: Cooper DeJean admittedly wants to face former teammate A.J. Brown
results.description: Eagles All-Pro corner Cooper DeJean would "love" to face his former teammate, Patriots receiver A.J. Brown.

results.title: IndyCar Nashville – Qualifying Results
results.description: Saturday afternoon at Nashville Superspeedway was dedicated to IndyCar qualifying, with each driver taking a single, two-lap attempt to set the grid. The driver that was able to cruise the fastest around the 1.33-mile oval was Kyle Kirkwood, completing his laps in 47.5885 seconds at an average speed of 196.852 MPH Josef Newgarden and Scott [...] The post IndyCar Nashville – Qualifying Results appeared first on Motorsport Week .
